candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Measure the capital readiness floor before trusting any round or timing strategy.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: Without a clear round type and timing strategy, capital readiness cannot be meaningfully assessed.

candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Pre-seed raise from angel network with revenue milestone readiness, deck-only pitch, raise-now timing.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: Pre-seed with angel networks converts fastest when revenue milestones are the lead signal and the deck is tight.

candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Seed round from micro VC with user growth signal, memo-first pitch, build-more-traction timing.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: Micro VCs at seed prefer memo-first pitches backed by user growth data, especially when the founder is building more traction.

candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Series A from institutional VC with revenue milestone, data room pitch, raise-now timing.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: Series A institutional rounds require data room preparation and clear revenue milestones to close efficiently.

candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Revenue-based financing from strategic investor with team completeness signal, warm intro, consider-bootstrap timing.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: Revenue-based financing through strategic partners is optimal when the team is complete and bootstrapping is a viable alternative.
